projectDescription: An SEC-aware compliance workflow that wraps AI cash reconciliation suggestions with human-in-the-loop controls, role-gated decisions, and an append-only audit log designed to satisfy Rule 204-2 books-and-records requirements.
keyFeatures: AI suggestion engine with swappable OpenAI and rule-based providers — AI suggests, never decides
Role-gated reviewer decisions (OPS / CCO) with mandatory decision notes
Append-only audit log with atomic transactional writes binding state changes to audit entries
SLA tracking with first-class SLA_BREACH_RECORDED audit entries and case list filter
Policy-as-data: rulesConfig and slaConfig stored on CaseType and snapshotted into every audit row
CSV export API and CLI for Rule 204-2 compliant books-and-records examination readiness
Shared Zod schemas across frontend and backend for type-safe request/response contracts
Institutional 'Ledger' design system with WCAG AA status palette tuned for compliance surfaces
publicApiSurface: Shared types: Case, CaseType, AuditLogEntry, User, AiSuggestion, ReviewerDecision, RulesConfig, SlaConfig
Shared schemas: CreateCaseInputSchema, ReviewerDecisionInputSchema, CaseListQuerySchema, AuditLogQuerySchema, ExportQuerySchema
